name: default
description: JSON sibling of the triage-board template: the board as machine-readable data — a summary line plus columns, each with a name and an items array (title, tag, sub). The agent expands the columns[]/items[] exemplars.

slots.description: Kanban columns; expand the exemplar object per column and item.

shape.item[]: { title: string, tag: enum[bug,feat,chore,debt], sub: string }
